MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Courtcall:
Brett Gibbs, Esq., 415-341-5318, appearing for Fenge Wong, Plaintiff and moving party.
Stephen Collier, Esq., 415-771-9850, appearing for Guichan Wu, for Defendant

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANT GUICHAN WU, WEN YU, ZHIQIANG YU, TAO YU DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is Taken Under Submission. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: J. Murphy, Reported:JAVS. (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-20-2020 Continued To Nov-12-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Courtcall:
Brett L Gibbs, Esq., 415-341-5318, appearing for Fenge Wong, Plaintiff/opposing party.
Stephen L. Collier, Esq., 415-771-9850, appearing for Jane Doe, for Defendant/moving party.

Hearing is held. Court address with counsel present, Mayor's ability to "eliminate/suspend/vacate" just causes for eviction authorized by the Rent Ordinance; the effect of the moratorium - are Notices that expire during the covered period invalid or stayed; does the moratorium apply to physical recovery of possession or to the legal process preceding physical recovery, etc.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT GUICHAN WU, WEN YU, ZHIQIANG YU, TAO YU DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is continued to November 12, 2020 At 9:30 D. 501. Supplemental Briefing by November 2, 2020, Reply by November 9, 2020. Parties waive notice. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: W. Trupek, Not Reported. (D501)
